mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, type, icon, sort_order, status, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_finance_category ( user_id, name, type, icon, sort_order, status, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_finance_category WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_finance_category ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_finance_category WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT c., FROM t_finance_category c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_finance_category ( user_id, name, type, icon, sort_order, status, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.type, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_finance_category WHERE id IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
